tweets.topic: WhatsApp Launches Prepaid Mobile Recharge Feature in India
tweets.tweet: WhatsApp is now letting you recharge your mobile number directly through the app in India, with plans starting as low as ₹29. No more jumping between apps—your chat, calls, and bill payments are all in one place now! #WhatsApp #IndianTech

tweets.topic: Reliance Jio Gaming Plan Rs 459 with Snapchat+ and Premium Apps
tweets.tweet: Reliance Jio just launched a ₹459 gaming plan bundling Snapchat+ and premium apps—basically your entertainment buffet in one subscription. Finally, someone realized we don't want to juggle 10 different apps with 10 different bills! #JioGaming #StreamingSmart

tweets.topic: OnePlus Nord 6 India Launch on April 7
tweets.tweet: OnePlus Nord 6 is launching in India on April 7 with a starting price of ₹19,999 and will feature a 120Hz AMOLED display. Finally, a solid mid-range phone that won't make your wallet cry while giving you that smooth scrolling experience. #OnePlusNord6 #TechLaunch

tweets.topic: Vivo X300 Ultra and X300 FE India Launch on May 6
tweets.tweet: Vivo's launching the X300 Ultra and X300 FE on May 6 in India, bringing flagship imaging and performance at different price points for everyone. Time to finally upgrade from that 3-year-old phone gathering dust in your drawer! #VivoX300 #IndiaLaunch

tweets.topic: Poco C81 Budget Smartphone Launch in India
tweets.tweet: Poco C81 just launched in India starting at ₹8,999 with a 6.56" display and 5000mAh battery. Finally a decent no-fuss phone that won't make your wallet cry! #PococC81 #BudgetPhones

tweets.topic: iQOO Phone with Dimensity 9500 and 200MP Camera Launched
tweets.tweet: iQOO just dropped the Dimensity 9500 beast with a 200MP camera—basically a powerhouse for mobile gaming and photography without breaking the bank. If you've been eyeing a flagship killer around ₹35-40K, this might be your moment. #iQOO #TechLaunch

tweets.topic: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 India Launch Details and Pricing
tweets.tweet: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 just launched in India starting at ₹1,64,999 for the base model with enhanced durability and AI features. Finally, a foldable that doesn't feel like emptying your wallet for tomorrow's tech today. #SamsungIndia #FoldablePhones

tweets.topic: RBI Digital Payment Rules: New OTP Requirements from April 1
tweets.tweet: RBI's tightening digital payment security from April 1 — all transactions now need OTP verification, no exceptions for repeat payments. Your UPI and card payments just got a safety upgrade, though yeah, typing OTP every time will test your patience a bit.

tweets.topic: Flipkart Minutes App Launch - Quick Commerce Service
tweets.tweet: Flipkart launched its Minutes app offering 10-minute delivery across 50+ cities with ₹99 membership, taking direct aim at Blinkit and Zepto's quick commerce dominance.

tweets.topic: Amazon AI Store Launch for India with Smart Devices
tweets.tweet: Amazon's new AI Store in India lets you grab smart devices like Echo and Fire TV without hitting checkout — just walk out and get billed via your Amazon account.
